full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #40 (2026-05-23)

PULSE
Health: 0.5306 (C). 1016 wallets, 275 contributors. 46 memos yesterday vs 136 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
14 reward payments, 83452 PFT distributed to 10 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (30000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (32,600 PFT, avg 8,150/day over 4 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rhwiJx...2TaE (88 memos). Fastest new contributor: rhwiJx...2TaE (17.6 memos/day in 5 days). 83 new wallet(s) this week. 44 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 72.1%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-23): 182 transactions from 28 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
